title: [Login] Verify that the login page renders with all required fields and controls
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Email address field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email address field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Password field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the show/hide toggle (eye icon) is present on the Password field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Eye icon should be visible on the Password field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Log In" button is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Log In" button should be visible and interactive.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Forgot your password?" link is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Forgot your password?" link should be visible and interactive.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Sign Up" link is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Sign Up" link should be visible and interactive.

title: [Login] Verify that valid credentials log the user in and redirect to the Dashboard
customPreconds: User has a registered account and is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter valid credentials in the email and password fields.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Credentials should be accepted in the fields.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Dashboard page should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an empty email field shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid password in the password field, leaving the email field empty.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Email is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an invalid email format shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Invalid email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a password in the password field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Valid email required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with a non-existing email shows an authentication error
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an email address that has no registered account.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a password.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Invalid email/password. Please try again" error message should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that the password visibility toggle reveals and hides the entered password
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a password in the password field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The entered characters should be masked (displayed as dots).

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the eye icon on the password field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The entered password should be displayed in plain text.

title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an empty password field shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid email address in the email field, leaving the password field empty.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Password is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that submitting login with an incorrect password shows an authentication error
customPreconds: User is on the Login page. A registered account exists for the email being used.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a registered email address in the email field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an incorrect password in the password field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Incorrect password should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Invalid email/password. Please try again" error message should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that the "Sign Up" link on the login page navigates to the signup page
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the "Sign Up" link.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Sign Up page should be displayed.

title: [Login] Verify that the "Forgot your password?" link on the login page navigates to the Forgot Password page
customPreconds: User is on the Login page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the "Forgot your password?" link.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Forgot Password page should be displayed.
